productDisplayName: Puma Men's Motorsport Better Blue T-shirt
description: CompositionTeal blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with ribbed neckline, tape detailing on the inseam of the collar,  subliminal graphic print on the front with rubber print on the chest and cat logo printed on the back below necklineFittingRegularWash Care Gentle machine wash with similar colours in cool water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean Wash and iron inside out Look cool this summer in this teal blue tee from puma inspired by Motorsports. The subliminal print on the front with images of racing car parts and bikes infuses this tee with a big dose of racing spirit. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for a casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
